details.test: Task 1: Find and shortlist 1BR independent living in Austin under $2,500
Task 2: Compare dementia-capable residential care in Chicago and book cheaper tour
Task 3: Request Austin respite care under $180/day with strong rating for June week
Task 4: Use cost calculator for Denver assisted living and save estimate under $3,200
Task 5: Find next-month afternoon event within 15 miles of 94110 and RSVP
Task 6: Request printed brochure for pet-friendly Austin community with gym
Task 7: Apply for part-time Care Assistant job near Boston with >= $18/hr
Task 8: Build reading list of three moving-to-assisted-living articles within 6 months
Task 9: Reserve cheapest ensuite garden-view room under $3,000 in an Austin community
